query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Oil executives warn Trump administration that gasoline prices will get worse
articles.description: Oil and gas executives warn the Trump administration gasoline prices may surge as fuel inventories hit critical lows ahead of summer travel.

articles.title: Maharashtra Restricts Bulk Consumers At Retail Pumps
articles.description: The Food and Civil Supplies Department issued an order on Friday, saying the restrictions are intended to prevent hoarding, black marketing and diversion of fuel, while assuring that petrol and diesel stocks remain adequate across the state.

articles.title: Do you own a 'polluting vehicle'? You'll be paying more to drive it in the ACT
articles.description: Canberrans face increased motor vehicle duty on petrol and diesel cars from February 2027. Understand the new charges for specific vehicle categories and how much extra you could pay.

articles.title: Sable keeps up the fight for energy -and lower oil prices
articles.description: The goal of regulation cannot be to prevent energy production altogether. Sable is fighting the good fight. For that, it deserves our support.

articles.title: Two killed in separate hit-and-run incidents in Tiruvallur
articles.description: Two men died in separate hit-and-run crashes in Tiruvallur district; a lorry killed a petrol bunk worker and a speeding bike fatally hit a flower vendor.

articles.title: Signed file on 100 per cent ethanol fuel rules: Nitin Gadkari says multiple companies to adopt alternative blend
articles.description: Union Minister Nitin Gadkari has approved 100 percent ethanol blend fuel. This move aims to significantly reduce India's import dependence on fossil fuels. Maruti Suzuki has launched a WagonR running on 100 percent ethanol. Other companies like Toyota, Suzuki, and Hyundai will soon follow. This initiative promises a viable alternative to petrol and diesel, boosting domestic production and economic growth.

articles.title: Appeal for witnesses of disorder at Texaco petrol station
articles.description: South Wales Police are appealing for help with their investigation

articles.title: Heating oil prices are another casualty of war | Letter
articles.description: The beautiful coastline of Maine apparently now reaches to the Strait of Hormuz. We have a century-old house that uses propane for radiator heat and hot water use. We have always done the annual service contract for supply and maintenance since we moved to Augusta eight years ago. The cost has risen pretty steadily year […]

articles.title: Crude Oil Prices Sink Ahead of Expected US-Iran Deal
articles.description: Brent and WTI crude oil prices retreated sharply on Hyperliquid ahead of a US-Iran deal that may be signed on Sunday as risks remained

articles.title: No shortage of energy in country, LPG, oil supply situation comfortable: Hardeep Singh Puri
articles.description: Sharing data of fuel prices during May 2022 to May 2026, Puri said petrol prices in Pakistan rose by 70 per cent, Sri Lanka by 66 per cent, France by 47 per cent, Italy 46 per cent, Bangladesh 36 per cent and the US 35 per cent.
